HR Interview: Tell me about yourself - how your technical background led you to this role.
What are your greatest strengths and weaknesses as a developer/engineer?
Why are you interested in this company and this role in tech?
Describe a challenging technical problem you faced and how you solved it.
How do you stay updated with new technologies/frameworks/tools?
Give an example of when you had to collaborate with a non-technical team member.
Tell me about a time you missed a deadline or project target.
Have you ever disagreed with a technical decision? How did you handle it?
How do you prioritize tasks when you have multiple technical work items?
Describe a time you introduced a new tool or process.
What is a mistake you made in a technical project and how did you mitigate it?
How do you handle working under pressure or tight timelines?
What motivates you in a technical role?
How do you ensure quality in your work?
Tell me about a time you had to learn a new technology quickly.
Discuss an instance when you took ownership of a project.
Where do you see your career in the next 3-5 years?
How do you handle feedback from peers or mentors?
What would you do differently in a past project?
Why are you a good fit for this role?
Technical Interview: What is the difference between AI, ML, and Deep Learning?
What are the main goals of Artificial Intelligence?
Explain the concept of intelligent agents in AI.
What are the different types of AI - narrow, general, and super AI?
How does a knowledge-based system work?
Explain the difference between supervised and unsupervised AI.
What are heuristic functions in AI?
What is the role of search algorithms in AI?
Compare BFS and DFS algorithms.
What is reinforcement learning and how does it differ from supervised learning?
Explain Markov Decision Processes (MDP).
What are neural networks and how do they mimic the human brain?
Explain the working of backpropagation.
What is the difference between ANN, CNN, and RNN?
What is the role of activation functions in neural networks?
How does AI handle uncertainty?
Explain natural language processing in the context of AI.
What are expert systems and their components?
What are the ethical challenges in AI development?
How do you evaluate the performance of an AI system?

What is feature engineering?
How do you evaluate model performance?

Explain overfitting and underfitting.
What is normalization vs standardization?
What is the importance of data visualization?
What is PCA (Principal Component Analysis)?

What is cross-validation and why is it used?
